# F073 Image-Teacher RNA-Student JEPA

## Decision
`F073_RNA_STUDENT_IMAGE_TEACHER_WEAK_OR_UNSTABLE`

## Purpose
F072 showed that non-oracle image PCA carries better transition geometry than observed RNA PCA, while linear RNA-to-image PCA prediction underfits. F073 trains the smallest masked-RNA student/predictor against stop-gradient train-only image PCA targets and scores whether the learned RNA-side latent preserves the image-teacher transition calibration behavior.

## Key Results
- observed RNA abs transition optimism: `0.069308`
- observed RNA abs delta optimism: `0.083904`
- image PCA abs transition optimism: `0.014697`
- image PCA abs delta optimism: `0.049570`
- candidate abs transition optimism: `0.049725`
- candidate abs delta optimism: `0.074547`
- candidate eval image-latent cosine: `0.702079`
- candidate effective rank: `4.608701`
- mean train prediction-target cosine: `0.800348`

## Leakage And Promotion Status
- No model is promoted.
- RNA student trains on train rows only against stop-gradient train-only image PCA targets.
- Eval rows are used only for scoring.
- Synthetic `z_bio`, `condition_key`, `biological_key`, exact heldout action one-hot, eval target means, and pooled train+test statistics are not used as model inputs.
